IRON / STEEL

Islamabad Iron

Our Legacy

A Foundation Built on
Trust & Quality.

Founded in Bahawalpur, Hafiz Iron & Building Material Store has grown into a premier destination for high-grade structural steel and certified cement brands. We believe that every brick and bar contributes to the safety of a home, and we take that responsibility seriously.

Trusted by 500+ Clients

15+

Years Excellence

Live Market Rates

Get the most accurate and updated daily rates for steel and cement directly from factories.

Fast Delivery

Reliable and prompt site delivery services ensuring your construction never stops.

Certified Quality

All products are sourced directly from authorized manufacturers with full certification.

GROW FAST WITH US

Market Rate?

Original Brand

Bahaawalpur premier destination for high-grade structural steel and certified cement brands. Foundations built with trust since 2023.
